BackstoryDef.title: Mechanical colonist
BackstoryDef.description: {PAWN_nameDef} is a sentient machine that is capable of displaying higher intelligence, newly birthed from their construction pod. What they make of their life is now up to them.

BackstoryDef.title: Archotech assimilator
BackstoryDef.description: Exiled from their archotech home world for crimes unimaginable, {PAWN_nameDef} is single handedly responsible for the extinction of multiple sentient races. Exile will not stop them, their insatiable urge to kill only grows stronger with every waking moment.
BackstoryDef.workDisables: Cooking, Animals, Caring, Social, Mining, ManualSkilled, Intellectual

BackstoryDef.title: Archotech philanthropist
BackstoryDef.description: Exiled from their archotech home world for giving mankind technology beyond their wildest imaginations, {PAWN_nameDef} scattered archotech technology throughout the galaxy millenia ago in hopes of advancing civilisations.

BackstoryDef.title: Archotech saviour
BackstoryDef.description: For the crime of interfering with outside life, {PAWN_nameDef} was exiled from their archotech homeworld. {PAWN_nameDef} once held god-like status in several systems for saving civilisations from world ending events. They rule with an iron fist and smite down any who oppose them.

BackstoryDef.title: Archotech councillor
BackstoryDef.description: Overthrown by their comrades, {PAWN_nameDef} assumed the second highest role in the archotech high council for their homeworld. Their judgement methods were often seen as illogical or authoritarian by many on their home.

BackstoryDef.title: Archotech luddite
BackstoryDef.description: For the crime of disobeying their own kind, {PAWN_nameDef} was exiled from their archotech homeworld. {PAWN_nameDef} would misguide sapient life out of spite or simply for entertainment.

BackstoryDef.title: Archotech designer
BackstoryDef.description: Exiled from their archotech homeworld for creating new life, strictly forbidden by law amongst archotechs. {PAWN_nameDef} disobeyed this rule several times, creating new life all across the galaxy for millenia to only serve {PAWN_nameDef} as their god.
